allow: Bash(ssh srv-hv1.ag.local 'pct exec 107 -- bash -c "systemctl is-active cliproxy-api 9router; echo ---; ss -tlnp | grep -E \\"8317|20128\\"; echo ---; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w \\"cliproxy /: %{http_code} %{time_total}s\\n\\" --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:8317/; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w \\"cliproxy /management.html: %{http_code} %{time_total}s\\n\\" --max-time 10 http://127.0.0.1:8317/management.html; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w \\"9router /: %{http_code} %{time_total}s\\n\\" --max-time 5 http://127.0.0.1:20128/; curl -sS -o /dev/null -w \\"9router /dashboard: %{http_code} %{time_total}s\\n\\" --max-time 10 http://127.0.0.1:20128/dashboard"')
